entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) studied for yield and drought tolerance

entities.name: POD YIELD
entities.description: The yield of pods produced by the groundnut plant, referred to as PY

entities.name: KERNEL YIELD
entities.description: The yield of kernels produced by the groundnut plant, referred to as KY

entities.name: TOTAL BIOMASS
entities.description: The total biological mass of the plant, referred to as TBM

entities.name: HARVEST INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of harvested grain to total above-ground biomass, referred to as HI

entities.name: SPECIFIC LEAF AREA
entities.description: The ratio of leaf area to leaf dry mass, referred to as SLA

entities.name: PLANT HEIGHT
entities.description: The vertical height of the groundnut plant, referred to as PH

entities.name: POD BIOMASS
entities.description: The biomass of the pods, referred to as PB

entities.name: SHELLING PERCENTAGE
entities.description: The percentage of the pod weight that is kernel, referred to as SHP

entities.name: SCMR
entities.description: A physiological trait related to canopy moisture retention

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to maintain growth and yield under water-limited conditions

entities.name: MOISTURE STRESS TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of the plant to withstand moisture stress

entities.name: COMBINING ABILITY ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method to evaluate the performance of parents and their progenies in breeding

entities.name: GENERAL COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The average performance of a parent in a series of crosses, referred to as GCA

entities.name: SPECIFIC COMBINING ABILITY
entities.description: The deviation of a cross from the expected performance based on GCA, referred to as SCA

entities.name: DROUGHT-STRESSED
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by limited water availability, referred to as DS

entities.name: NON-STRESSED
entities.description: Environmental condition with adequate water availability, referred to as NS

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted

entities.name: GENE ACTION
entities.description: The way genes interact to produce a phenotype

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENES
entities.description: Genes that contribute to the phenotype in a cumulative manner

entities.name: INHERITANCE
entities.description: The process by which genetic information is passed from parents to offspring

entities.name: ICGV 10178
entities.description: A specific groundnut genotype identified as a best general combiner

entities.name: ICGV 11369
entities.description: A groundnut genotype used in crosses

entities.name: ICGV 10373
entities.description: A groundnut genotype used in crosses

entities.name: ICGV 15083
entities.description: A groundnut genotype used in crosses

entities.name: ICGV 98412
entities.description: A groundnut genotype used in crosses

entities.name: ICGV 15094
entities.description: A groundnut genotype used in crosses
